mapper.sql: id, provider_code, market_code, enabled, intraday_interval_minutes, close_snapshot_enabled, rank_limit, execution_state, last_intraday_at, last_close_trade_date, last_success_at, next_retry_at, consecutive_failures, last_error_code, last_error_message, run_claim_token, run_claimed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_sector_ranking_config ORDER BY market_code

SELECT FROM market_sector_ranking_config WHERE enabled = TRUE AND execution_state NOT IN ('BLOCKED_AUTH', 'BLOCKED_PERMISSION', 'BLOCKED_CONFIG') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY market_code
mapper.update: UPDATE market_sector_ranking_config SET enabled = #{enabled}, intraday_interval_minutes = #{intradayIntervalMinutes}, close_snapshot_enabled = #{closeSnapshotEnabled}, rank_limit = #{rankLimit}, execution_state = 'IDLE', next_retry_at = NULL, consecutive_failures = 0, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE market_sector_ranking_config SET run_claim_token = #{token}, run_claimed_at = #{claimedAt}, execution_state = 'ACTIVE' WHERE id = #{id} AND (run_claim_token IS NULL OR run_claimed_at IS NULL OR run_claimed_at < #{staleBefore})

UPDATE market_sector_ranking_config SET execution_state = 'IDLE', last_success_at = #{successAt}, next_retry_at = NULL, consecutive_failures = 0, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, last_intraday_at = CASE WHEN #{snapshotType} = 'INTRADAY' THEN #{successAt} ELSE last_intraday_at END, last_close_trade_date = CASE WHEN #{snapshotType} = 'CLOSE' THEN #{tradeDate} ELSE last_close_trade_date END WHERE id = #{id} AND run_claim_token = #{token}
